name: read_vcd
short_description: Import simulation data in vcd format
full_help:
read_vcd

Description: 
Import simulation data in vcd format

Syntax: 
read_vcd  [-strip_path <arg>] [-no_strip] [-out_file <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]
          <file>

Usage: 
  Name           Description
  --------------------------
  [-strip_path]  Specifies the name of the instance of the current design as 
                 it appears in the VCD file
  [-no_strip]    Do not strip first two levels of hierarchy from VCD file
  [-out_file]    Specifies the name of the output file that contains nets 
                 that could not be matched
  [-quiet]       Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]     Suspend message limits during command execution
  <file>         Specifies the name of the VCD file to be read

Categories: 
FileIO, Power, Simulation

arguments.description: Specifies the name of the instance of the current design as it appears in the VCD file
